title: picea balsamea
intro: Picea balsamea, also known as Eastern White Spruce, is a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to northeastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Picea balsamea include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Picea balsamea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
